mapper.insert: REPLACE INTO tb_store_rating_stats ( store_id, total_rating, total_count, taste_rating, service_rating, environment_rating, cost_performance_rating, high_count, middle_count, low_count, image_count ) SELECT #{storeId}, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(rating), 1), 0), COUNT(id), IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(taste_rating), 1), 0), IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(service_rating), 1), 0), IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(environment_rating), 1), 0), IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(cost_performance_rating), 1), 0), SUM(IF(rating >= 4, 1, 0)), SUM(IF(rating = 3, 1, 0)), SUM(IF(rating <= 2, 1, 0)), SUM(IF(images IS NOT NULL AND images != '[]', 1, 0)) FROM tb_evaluate WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status = 1
